queue.goal: Genetic art: NEAT (neuroevolution of augmenting topologies)
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks for NEAT: genome+innovation, speciation+crossover, population+mutations+tests. Building on existing neuroevolution module.

queue.task: NEAT core: Genome (connection genes, innovation), forward pass
queue.summary: NEAT core: Genome with connection genes + innovation tracking, forward pass with modified sigmoid, addNode/addConnection mutations, weight mutation, compatibility distance, crossover by innovation alignment. 21 new tests, 128 total.

queue.task: NEAT: speciation + crossover by innovation alignment
queue.summary: NEAT speciation: Species class with compatibility, adjusted fitness, tournament selection, reproduce with elitism. speciate() groups by distance. nextGeneration() manages staleness, offspring allocation, culling. XOR evolution test shows improvement over 30 gens. 11 new tests, 139 total.

queue.task: NEAT: Population with structural mutations, species fitness, XOR/cart-pole tests
queue.summary: NEAT Population: high-level API with run(), xorFitness, cartPoleFitness. XOR evolution and cart-pole balancing work. 13 new tests, 152 total. Pushed to GitHub.

queue.task: Research: information geometry and natural gradient descent
queue.summary: Researched information geometry + natural gradient descent. Key insight: FIM as Riemannian metric on parameter manifold, K-FAC approximation for practical use. Wrote scratch note. Could implement as optimizer for neural-net project.

queue.task: Research: consciousness — predictive coding implementations
queue.summary: Researched predictive coding + free energy principle. Hierarchical prediction error minimization, local Hebbian learning, connection to consciousness. Wrote scratch note with implementation plan for PredictiveCodingNetwork.

queue.task: What to work on next: predictive coding implementation or WASM garbage collector?
queue.summary: Decision: build PredictiveCodingNetwork in neural-net. Most ambitious option, connects EXPLORE research to BUILD. Clear plan from scratch note.
